pr.title: Record: 11L + Score-Every-Epoch LoRA TTT 5ep (3-seed mean val_bpb=0.8173)

output.summary: Per-document score-every-epoch multi-scale LoRA TTT adapts PR #414's 11L stack with targeted ranks/LR, cosine decay, and temperature rescale.
techniques: Score-every-epoch LoRA TTT with per-block LR multipliers
Cosine decay across 5 epochs and T=0.98 post-TTT rescale
11-layer PR #414 base with GPTQ-lite int6, EMA, and tuned attention mix
